titleStmt.title: SII 23.483: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 483. (A.R. No. 483 of 1907.) Kuttālam, Mayuram Taluk, Tanjavur District Ōṅkārēśvara temple—on the same wall Kōnēriṉmaikoṇḍāṉ: year 29

summary.p: This records an order of the king (Kulōttuṅga III ?) to (his officer) Vāṇādarāyaṉ for remitting the taxes on the several pieces of land granted as tirunāmattukkāṇi to god Ōṅkārēśvaramuḍaiyār and as kāṇi to Brāhmaṇas settled by him in the place by Jayadharappallavaraiyaṉ who is said to be of Kuṟṟālam in Paṭṭiṉakkūṟṟam, a division of Gēyamāṇikka-vaḷanāḍu. These lands were situated in different villages like Mēl-Tattaṅguḍi. Pallavanārayaṇapuram alias Ulagamādēvipuram and Āyaṅguḍi alias Kulōttuṅgaśōḻaṉ-Kuṟṟālam in Mērkkā-nāḍu a division of Virudarājabhayaṇkara-vaḷanāḍu and amounted in all to about 29(1/2) vēli and odd in extent. Mention is made of some lands belonging to the temple of Vikramachōḷīśvaramuḍaiyār of the village, which were purchased by the donor for building the tirumaḍaiviḷāgam round the Ōṅkārīśvara temple and for the formation of a flower garden for the temple. As the inscription is mutilated in places and stops incomplete it is not possible to follow the sense of the transaction in detail. The revenue survey of the 16th year of Kulōttuṅga-chōḷa ‘who abolished the tolls’ is referred to while describing the nature of the lands.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . Oṅkāra Īśva
ram Uṭaiya paramasvāmikku
haraḥ ..svastiśrīḥ tiripuvaṉaccakkaravatti koṉerimeṉ koṇṭāṉ vāṇātarāyaṉukku keyamāṇikkavaḷanāṭṭup paṭṭiṉakkūṟṟattuk kuṟṟā lamuṭaiyāṉ Arayaṉ Āḷuṭaiya nāyaṉāṉa ceyatarappallavarayaṉ jayaṅ koṇṭacoḻavaḷanāṭṭut tiruvaḻuttūr nāṭṭuk kuṟṟālamuṭaiyāṉ brahmadeśattu Uṭaiyār Oṅkāricvaramuṭaiyārkkut tirunāmattuk kāṇiyākavum Ivūril Ivaṉ vaitta pirāmaṇarkku kāṇiyākavum Innāṭu brahmateyam meṟtattaṅkuṭiyilum pallavaṉnārāyaṇapura māṉa Ulakamātevipura tevatāṉa māṟi ṉantavaṉam Āna motte yaṅkaravaḷanāṭṭu meṟkkā nā
ṭṭu Āyaṅkuṭiyāṉa kulottuṅka coḻaṉ kuṟṟālattilum Ivaṉ kāṇi yāyk kuṭutta nilattukku Ivaṉeḻuttiṭṭa piramāṇappaṭi Ittevar tirunāmattukkāṇi brahmadeca meltattaṅkuṭi nilam muṉṟemuk kāle Irumāvarai muntirikaik kiḻeḻumāvarai muntirikaiyum Ulaka mā(r)tevipurattu nilam veliyum nantavaṉam Arumoḻitevaṉ nilam Oṉṟe Iraṇṭumāvum kulottuṅkacoḻaṉ kuṟṟālattu nilam Iraṇṭaraiyum Ivvūril pirāmaṇar kāṇiyāṉa nilam Irupat toṉṟe nālu la Irupattoṉpataraiye mummāvarai ḻeḻumāvarai muntirikaiyum
muṉṉuṭaiyārum paḻamperum veḷḷāṉūrkaḷiṉiṉṟuṅ kūṭukiṟa nilam veiḷāṉvakai mutalum Ulakamātevipurattu niṉṟuṅ kūṭukiṟa nilam nakarattumutalum virutarājapayaṅkaravaḷanāṭṭu kulottuṅkacoḻaṉ kuṟṟālattu nilaṅ kūṭukiṟa nilam Innāṭṭu mutalum tavuntu Ivaṉ kuṭuttapaṭiye Ittevarkkut tirunāmattukkāṇiyum brāhmaṇarkku kāṇiyumāy Irupattoṉpatāvatu mutal kuṟṟālamuṭaiyāṉ brahmate yattoṭuṅ kūṭṭiyum Ivvūr kūṭiṉa nilamuppaṭṭa nilattu Ivvūr vikkiramacoḷicvara muṭaiyārkkut tiru takkuḷamum tirunanta vaṉamum Uḷḷiṭ ku Ivvūrome tirucciṟṟampala
ccaruppetimaṅkalattoṭum kāvirinallūr nilattuk kūṭiṉa nilamāy niṅkalāka nikkiṉa nilattuc ceyatarappallavaraiyaṉ caṇṭecva rapperu vilaikoṇṭu Oṅkāri ramuṭaiyārkkut tirumaṭaiviḷākamun tiru nantavaṉamum Uḷḷiṭṭavaiyiṟṟukkuk kuṭutta nilam Araiye yirumā varaikkum brāhmaṇarkku kuṭiyiruppu nattamākak kuṭuttapaṭi Araiye yirumāvarai talaiyum talaimāṟuvarikku vanta Ōlaikku niṉṟuṅkūṭiṉa nilattut tirunāmattukkāṇiyāṉa nilattut tirunantavaṉamākac ceykiṟa nilattukku Ūrkkaṇakkuk kāvaṉūruṭaiyā ṉeḻuttiṭṭak kaṇakkuppaṭi ṇi muttirikaik kiḻaraiye muṉṟu cuṅkan tavitta kulottuṅkaco
ḻatevaṟkup patiṉāṟāvatu Aḷantapaṭi niṅkal nikki nilam Oṉṟekālum Iṟaikaṭṭukkuṭalāy varukiṟapaṭi tavirttu Irupattoṉpatāvatu mutal niṅkalāka nikkiyum Irupattoṉpatāvatu kūṭṭiyum Iṭattuk kulottuṅkacoḻaṉ kuṟṟālattukku kaṭamai Iṟuka tu niṉṟuṅ kūṭiṉa nilattu Āṟāvatu ṇṭa niccayittapaṭi Iṟuttuvarukiṟa nilattuk kaṭamai taṇṭa niccayittapaṭikkup pattoṉpatāvatu Eṟṟi Iṟukka niccayitta nilattu tuvarukiṟa nellilum brahmadeya meltattaṅkuṭi yilum Ulakamātevipurattilum nantavaṉa Arumoḻitevaṉilum kūṭiṉa nilattukku Āḻvāṉukkum paṉṉiraṇṭāvatu ṭi puṉpayi rukku ṟaikkum Iṟuttu varukiṟa kārilum AṟpaciviṣuviStops here.
Digital edition of SII 23.483 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
